idea_ref: [T1.LLM] Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct zero-shot ST3 — LLM pipeline validation
hypothesis: Validate the LLM pipeline on T4. Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct at float16 needs ~6GB VRAM. Zero-shot prompt asks the model to classify argument goal (practical/epistemic) and basis (internal/external). Even modest accuracy on basis axis would beat current pe F1=0. Also tests ST1 and ST2 zero-shot as baselines.
